A. Shaw were quietly married Tues
day evening at o'clock by Rev.
E. M. Hill at the parsonage Of the
st. Paul Methodist church. The
only witnesses to the ceremony
were Mr.. and Mrs. Fred Spence.


& & &


CHURCH PICNIC.


The Knights of the Kingdom, EN-
manuel Baptist church, enjoyed a
picnic given Thursday evening in
cosy, secluded nook on the banks
of the Spokane river.


WILL GIVE PROGRAM.
The Sons of Norway will give a
program of music and speeches
next Tuesday, August %, at Apollo
hall.


HILsY-DAY WEDDING.
Roy l.. Day and Cora Hilby of
Moran prairie were quietly married
at high noon Monday, August 16, at
the parsonage of the st. Paul Meth
Odist church. Rev. E. M. Hill Off
ciated.


4 &


MRS. DE LONG WILL SPEAK.
Mrs. belong, assistant pastor of
Grace Methodist church, will speak
on Equal Suffrage" tomorrow even
ing at the Emmanuel Presbyterian
church.
